$Comment: Example UNIQUE affix, granted by the 'horrific' VARIANT via AllowedVariants (NOT a rarity). Because 'horrific' only rolls on spiders (Variants/Horrific.json Families block), 'venomous' is transitively spider-only with NO affix-side family filter needed. AllowedVariants gates which variants may grant this affix (mirrors AllowedRarities for the rarity axis); the variant lists it in Affixes.Allowed to actually roll it. Fold-only (an OutDamage delta, no native EntityEffect asset), so it costs nothing beyond the pipeline multiply. Delete this file (and Variants/Horrific.json) to remove the example.
Name: venomous
